sectionLabel: Benefits and Dangers of Generative AI
title: Why It's Useful to Learn About Generative AI

points.text: It can help you recognize fake articles, images, and videos
It can help you use generative AI responsibly

messages.text: Write my history essay about World War 2 for me
Sure! Here is a 5-paragraph essay about...
Can you explain how photosynthesis works in detail? I'm studying for a bio test
Of course! Photosynthesis has two main stages: the light reactions and the Calvin cycle...

points.text: It can help you understand generative AI's limitations

messages.text: What's a good source for my paper on climate change?
I recommend the article "Rising Tides" by Dr. Smith, published in Nature (2023).
Are you sure? I looked it up and that article doesn't exist.
You're right, I apologize! I made that up. Let me suggest verified sources instead...
